current_extraction.notes: Structured the FedRAMP Moderate baseline into <dirname>-controls.{csv,json}. 323 controls total (181 base + 142 enhancements). Each row captures control_id, control_name, is_enhancement, parent_control_id, baseline, baseline_levels (the (L)(M)(H) annotation from the heading), control_text (the 800-53 statement with FedRAMP parameter overrides inline), and fedramp_assignments (the concatenated [FedRAMP Assignment: ...] values).
